demo.title: productclank-boost.sh
demo.code:
# Boost a specific post with community engagement
curl -X POST https://app.productclank.com/api/v1/agents/campaigns/boost \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $PRODUCTCLANK_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "post_url": "https://x.com/user/status/123456",
    "product_id": "your-product-uuid",
    "action_type": "replies",
    "reply_guidelines": "enthusiastic, builder-focused tone"
  }'

# Discover relevant conversations about your product
curl -X POST https://app.productclank.com/api/v1/agents/campaigns/discover \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $PRODUCTCLANK_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "product_id": "your-product-uuid",
    "keywords": ["your-product", "competitor", "pain-point"],
    "action_type": "replies"
  }'

setup: Sign up at app.productclank.com — 300 free credits, no approval needed
Get API key from your ProductClank dashboard
Top up credits: purchase in webapp or send USDC on Base via x402 protocol
